case_title: CANNON STREET, INC. VS. GARDNER MEIN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANNON STREET, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANNON STREET, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEIN, GARDNER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RICHARD SMITH, PRESIDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANNON STREET, INC.
